How to minimize effects of pesticide residues? 66 /c178 Buy food items from reliable sources after careful examination. Wash vegetables and fruits thoroughly before use. /c178 Store the raw and cooked foods properly and prevent microbial, rodent and insect invasion. /c178 Refrigerate perishable food items. /c178 Maintain good personal hygiene and keep the cooking and food storage areas clean and safe. /c178 Always use throughly cleaned utensils for cooking/ eating. /c178POINTS TO PONDER 67 Guideline 12 What are common Indian food beliefs, fads and taboos?
